TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: === Tana'al/Toto' === O likisi no tana'al/toto'葫瓜/葫蘆瓜的由來 Itini i 'orip no kalotamtamdaw, olanan a tana'al/toto' hananay a dateng i, ilaay to a kaladatengeng no tamdaw aca no Pangcah/'Amis, lomasato oya ma'ikesay mi'icangan a heci nira i nga'ayay a sapiradom to nanom ^epah ato patelian to maamaan. O sowal no mikingkiway o mafanaay a pasowal a tamdaw i, naitiniay i Aciw amilingato, dodosato to rikol no 4,000 amihecaan malengak to a tayra i Aforika , dodosato a tayra i cowaco:wa a kanataran, aninisato ano i Mosiko to, ano i Miro ato Tayko to iraay to amahpinang kopi paloma to tana'al/toto' to pinapi:na a mihecaan. Itini i Icipoto hawi, ora tana'al/toto' hananay o todongay o maro sapipatapi nira to mapatayay a tamdaw. Itinisato i Henan no Ciowkuk to 'ayaw no pito ano falo so'ot a mihcaan i, ora tana'al/toto' hananay iraay to ma'alaw amasadak naitadem. Tangasa imatini pakaaraay to 'enem ato pito so'ot a mihecaan tora Hemo ponka no Koaping . O pinangan no tana'al/toto'葫瓜/葫蘆瓜的特徵 Matiya o masay ami dapdap ko rengaw nira, kakahaday salimolosanay cifanohay hatatosatosa saan ko papah nira, iraay mato fokes ngisngis sapi kalic nira i kilang, malawod ko kacihelangan ato kalafawfawan i ano fa'inayang to ano fafahian to mahecaday to aci hana to tomel'iay hana. Ka'edaw no pirarad nira i pakaaraay to 15 komi, saciheci sa irako rimoroay matomari, irako tosaay koka rimoro, irako ko'edaway pakaaraay to cecay komi, oraloma' ora heci nira i, sato saan o kangdaway ato tomeli'ay, nikaorila metalaw toka si^enawan ato kafaliyosan. Sama^nen komaen ko heci nira.如何食用葫瓜/葫蘆瓜 Ano ciheci to kola tana'al/toto' i, yacaho ka 'ikes i, ri'ayawen to ami ridateng ami ara, tada fangcalay ama radateng, ano sakohawen to ano chiyanen to, nga'ayay to ami samaamaan ami tangtang. Nikaorila itini i Dipong i, oroma pecihanho ami cikcik ami pawari, rikol sato ami tangtang maro dadeng, itini no Amilikaan i, irako mipacamolay to sapafangsi ami tangtang tiya o maro nananomen nangra, romasato oya 'akaway nira ato papah nira iraay komi sadadengay a komaen. Oya ma'ikesay a heci nira.純熟的葫瓜果/葫蘆瓜果 Ma'ikes to ko heci no tana'al/toto' i, caay to kaga'ay a kaladatengen ami tangtang, sanaw araen ami ritod ami pawali mi'icang, ano ma^engto koka 'ateka nira i, ritosa han ami pela', falahen koya laloma'ay nira, tiya maro papa sapicahok to nanom to felac to poliyaw to kalo- maamaan, romasa ano caay ka pela'en i, kolkol hanca nani fafaled koya iraloma'ay nira, tiya malo sapi radom to nanom, o patelian to 'epah ato kalomaamaan, irako micongaay i papotal nira tosaka kapah a paca'it i patih ato fadahon no roma'. Sanaw i itini toya mipaypayiay a tamdaw i, maolahay ami ara to heci no tana'al/toto' tosapi sakawas nangra. Romasato ngaay sasa'angen to sapiparadiw kora ma'ikesay a heci nira. Samaanen ami paroma to tana'al/toto'.如何種植葫瓜/葫蘆瓜 Sapaloma to tana'al/toto' i, pakayraay toya kakoc nira, sa'ayaw miara to kakoc nira ami pawali ami 'icang, tiya ami misasapal, ma^engko to'as nira i, palomaen i omah, o lengaw no tana'al/toto' i matiyato masay ami dapdap ami kalic i kilang, sanaw misanga misarangra topi palomaan to tana'al/toto', opipalomaan to tana'al/toto' i, ma^deng itira i saka 3~4 a folad to cecay amihecaan, tangasasato i 9 a folad, ma^deng to aci falo aci hana ci heci. Itini i so^metay a romia'ad a marengaw, maolah a pananomen, ano matatodong kopi pananom, facal koka rengaw nira. Romasato ano matatodong kopipacidal ato fangcal ko ka rengawan nira a sota'para i, kalamkamay aci falo aci hana, tiya adihay fangcal ko heci nira. Ano misanga topi salangraan i, matiyahan opisanga' to palomaan to foto , polong no omaomahan ami salangra, tiya matating kora heci nira, tala'ayaw koka tata'ak no heci nira i, ira komi tafoay to heci nira to sakacaaw kacifao, tiya fangcal makapah koheci nira, ano matatodong koka tata'ak no heci nira i, ma^eng to a araen, tiya mangaay to a kaladatengen, nawhani o heci no tana'al/toto' i, nanomamang tangasa katata'akan nira i, sahto o kangdaway, ano caay ka tatodong ami siwka i, aratek matafesiw to ko pisiwkakan, caay to kanga'ay a mara dadeng. Opisiwkakan to tana'al/toto'葫瓜/葫蘆瓜收成期 Opisiwkakan to tana'al/toto' i ma^edeng itira saka 9 folad, sanaw malawod ko 8 a folad i misatapang to ami compi to sakataial, tayni i omah ami hapinang toka ciheci nira, ano kangdawho i ko^engelayho cingra madengay a datengen, ano adihay sato i manga'ay a cikciken ami pawali to sapipa halafin a nga'ay a kaladatengen, ano ma'ikes to koya heci no tana'al/toto' i, satemeli' sato ko podac nira, 'atekakay to caay to kangaay a kaladatengen, 'ican hato i tapangan tagasa ika'ikesan nira i, sa'ateka sato koya podac nira tiya mirito, miliyaw ami pawali, to sasangaen to papa/toto' , lomasato to sapiladom o patelian to nanom, aca o sasangaen to sasalamaan. Ano militod to tana'al/toto' i, mi'osawan ko 'akaway/wikol nira ami saka ^edaw, tiya manga'ay ami tatoy, ano mi tangtang to tana'al/toto' i, iraay ko mipodacay iraay ko caay pipodac, nikaorira cifanohay ko podac nira, sanaw solingaen kopi sasaw tiya mitangtang.(Siwkolan 'Amis suman0627/'23
S.PHON: === tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ === o~u ɾikisi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ**/****** itini i ʡo~urip no~u kaɾo~utamtamɬ~ɮaw, o~uɾanan a tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ ħananaj a ɬ~ɮatəŋ i, iɾaaj to~u a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw aʦa no~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis, ɾo~umasato~u o~uja maʡikəsaj miʡiʦaŋan a ħəʦi nira i ŋaʡajaj a sapiraɬ~ɮo~um to~u nano~um ʔəpaħ ato~u patəɾian to~u maamaan. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u mikiŋkiwaj o~u mafanaaj a paso~uwaɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw i, naitiniaj i aʦiw amiɾiŋato~u, ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~usato~u to~u riko~uɾ no~u *,*** amiħəʦaan maɾəŋak to~u a tajra i afo~urika , ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~usato~u a tajra i ʦo~uwaʦo~u:wa a kanataran, aninisato~u ano~u i mo~usiko~u to~u, ano~u i miro~u ato~u tajko~u to~u iraaj to~u amaħpinaŋ ko~upi paɾo~uma to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ to~u pinapi:na a miħəʦaan. itini i iʦipo~uto~u ħawi, o~ura tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ ħananaj o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj o~u maro~u sapipatapi nira to~u mapatajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. itinisato~u i ħənan no~u ʦio~uwko~u~uk to~u ʡajaw no~u pito~u ano~u faɾo~u so~uʡo~ut a miħʦaan i, o~ura tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ ħananaj iraaj to~u maʡaɾaw amasaɬ~ɮak naitaɬ~ɮəm. taŋasa imatini pakaaraaj to~u ʡənəm ato~u pito~u so~uʡo~ut a miħəʦaan to~ura ħəmo~u po~unka no~u ko~uapiŋ . o~u pinaŋan no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ**/****** matija o~u masaj ami ɬ~ɮapɬ~ɮap ko~u rəŋaw nira, kakaħaɬ~ɮaj saɾimo~uɾo~usanaj ʦifano~uħaj ħatato~usato~usa saan ko~u papaħ nira, iraaj mato~u fo~ukəs ŋisŋis sapi kaɾiʦ nira i kiɾaŋ, maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kaʦiħəɾaŋan ato~u kaɾafawfawan i ano~u faʡinajaŋ to~u ano~u fafaħian to~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u aʦi ħana to~u to~uməɾʡiaj ħana. kaʡəɬ~ɮaw no~u piraraɬ~ɮ nira i pakaaraaj to~u ** ko~umi, saʦiħəʦi sa irako~u rimo~uro~uaj mato~umari, irako~u to~usaaj ko~uka rimo~uro~u, irako~u ko~uʡəɬ~ɮawaj pakaaraaj to~u ʦəʦaj ko~umi, o~uraɾo~umaʡ o~ura ħəʦi nira i, sato~u saan o~u kaŋɬ~ɮawaj ato~u to~uməɾiʡaj, nikao~uriɾa mətaɾaw to~uka siʔənawan ato~u kafaɾijo~usan. samaʔnən ko~umaən ko~u ħəʦi nira.******/*** ano~u ʦiħəʦi to~u ko~uɾa tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, jaʦaħo~u ka ʡikəs i, riʡajawən to~u ami riɬ~ɮatəŋ ami ara, taɬ~ɮa faŋʦaɾaj ama raɬ~ɮatəŋ, ano~u sako~uħawən to~u ano~u ʦħijanən to~u, ŋaʡajaj to~u ami samaamaan ami taŋtaŋ. nikao~uriɾa itini i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, o~uro~uma pəʦiħanħo~u ami ʦikʦik ami pawari, riko~uɾ sato~u ami taŋtaŋ maro~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋ, itini no~u amiɾikaan i, irako~u mipaʦamo~uɾaj to~u sapafaŋsi ami taŋtaŋ tija o~u maro~u nanano~umən naŋra, ro~umasato~u o~uja ʡakawaj nira ato~u papaħ nira iraaj ko~umi saɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋaj a ko~umaən. o~uja maʡikəsaj a ħəʦi nira.******/**** maʡikəs to~u ko~u ħəʦi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, ʦaaj to~u ka*aʡaj a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən ami taŋtaŋ, sanaw araən ami rito~uɬ~ɮ ami pawaɾi miʡiʦaŋ, ano~u maʔəŋto~u ko~uka ʡatəka nira i, rito~usa ħan ami pəɾaʡ, faɾaħən ko~uja ɾaɾo~umaʡaj nira, tija maro~u papa sapiʦaħo~uk to~u nano~um to~u fəɾaʦ to~u po~uɾijaw to~u kaɾo~u- maamaan, ro~umasa ano~u ʦaaj ka pəɾaʡən i, ko~uɾko~uɾ ħanʦa nani fafaɾəɬ~ɮ ko~uja iraɾo~umaʡaj nira, tija maɾo~u sapi raɬ~ɮo~um to~u nano~um, o~u patəɾian to~u ʡəpaħ ato~u kaɾo~umaamaan, irako~u miʦo~uŋaaj i papo~utaɾ nira to~usaka kapaħ a paʦaʡit i patiħ ato~u faɬ~ɮaħo~un no~u ro~umaʡ. sanaw i itini to~uja mipajpajiaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, mao~uɾaħaj ami ara to~u ħəʦi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ to~usapi sakawas naŋra. ro~umasato~u ŋaaj sasaʡaŋən to~u sapiparaɬ~ɮiw ko~ura maʡikəsaj a ħəʦi nira. samaanən ami paro~uma to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ.******/*** sapaɾo~uma to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, pakajraaj to~uja kako~uʦ nira, saʡajaw miara to~u kako~uʦ nira ami pawaɾi ami ʡiʦaŋ, tija ami misasapaɾ, maʔəŋko~u to~uʡas nira i, paɾo~umaən i o~umaħ, o~u ɾəŋaw no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i matijato~u masaj ami ɬ~ɮapɬ~ɮap ami kaɾiʦ i kiɾaŋ, sanaw misaŋa misaraŋra to~upi paɾo~umaan to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ, o~upipaɾo~umaan to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, maʔɬ~ɮəŋ itira i saka *~* a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦəʦaj amiħəʦaan, taŋasasato~u i * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maʔɬ~ɮəŋ to~u aʦi faɾo~u aʦi ħana ʦi ħəʦi. itini i so~uʔmətaj a ro~umiaʡaɬ~ɮ a marəŋaw, mao~uɾaħ a panano~umən, ano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~upi panano~um, faʦaɾ ko~uka rəŋaw nira. ro~umasato~u ano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~upipaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ato~u faŋʦaɾ ko~u ka rəŋawan nira a so~utaʡpara i, kaɾamkamaj aʦi faɾo~u aʦi ħana, tija aɬ~ɮiħaj faŋʦaɾ ko~u ħəʦi nira. ano~u misaŋa to~upi saɾaŋraan i, matijaħan o~upisaŋaʡ to~u paɾo~umaan to~u fo~uto~u , po~uɾo~uŋ no~u o~umao~umaħan ami saɾaŋra, tija matatiŋ ko~ura ħəʦi nira, taɾaʡajaw ko~uka tataʡak no~u ħəʦi nira i, ira ko~umi tafo~uaj to~u ħəʦi nira to~u sakaʦaaw kaʦifao~u, tija faŋʦaɾ makapaħ ko~uħəʦi nira, ano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~uka tataʡak no~u ħəʦi nira i, maʔəŋ to~u a araən, tija maŋaaj to~u a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən, nawħani o~u ħəʦi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, nano~umamaŋ taŋasa katataʡakan nira i, saħto~u o~u kaŋɬ~ɮawaj, ano~u ʦaaj ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami siwka i, aratək matafəsiw to~u ko~u pisiwkakan, ʦaaj to~u kaŋaʡaj a mara ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋ. o~upisiwkakan to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ**/****** o~upisiwkakan to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i maʔəɬ~ɮəŋ itira saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, sanaw maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i misatapaŋ to~u ami ʦo~umpi to~u sakataiaɾ, tajni i o~umaħ ami ħapinaŋ to~uka ʦiħəʦi nira, ano~u kaŋɬ~ɮawħo~u i ko~uʔəŋəɾajħo~u ʦiŋra maɬ~ɮəŋaj a ɬ~ɮatəŋən, ano~u aɬ~ɮiħaj sato~u i maŋaʡaj a ʦikʦikən ami pawaɾi to~u sapipa ħaɾafin a ŋaʡaj a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən, ano~u maʡikəs to~u ko~uja ħəʦi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, satəməɾiʡ sato~u ko~u po~uɬ~ɮaʦ nira, ʡatəkakaj to~u ʦaaj to~u kaŋaaj a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən, ʡiʦan ħato~u i tapaŋan ta*asa ikaʡikəsan nira i, saʡatəka sato~u ko~uja po~uɬ~ɮaʦ nira tija mirito~u, miɾijaw ami pawaɾi, to~u sasaŋaən to~u papa/to~uto~uʡ , ɾo~umasato~u to~u sapiɾaɬ~ɮo~um o~u patəɾian to~u nano~um, aʦa o~u sasaŋaən to~u sasaɾamaan. ano~u miɾito~uɬ~ɮ to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, miʡo~usawan ko~u ʡakawaj/wiko~uɾ nira ami saka ʔəɬ~ɮaw, tija maŋaʡaj ami tato~uj, ano~u mi taŋtaŋ to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, iraaj ko~u mipo~uɬ~ɮaʦaj iraaj ko~u ʦaaj pipo~uɬ~ɮaʦ, nikao~urira ʦifano~uħaj ko~u po~uɬ~ɮaʦ nira, sanaw so~uɾiŋaən ko~upi sasaw tija mitaŋtaŋ.(siwko~uɾan ʡamis so~u~uman****/ʡ**
S.FORM: === Tana'al/Toto' === O likisi no tana'al/toto'葫瓜/葫蘆瓜的由來 Itini i 'orip no kalotamtamdaw, olanan a tana'al/toto' hananay a dateng i, ilaay to a kaladatengeng no tamdaw aca no Pangcah/'Amis, lomasato oya ma'ikesay mi'icangan a heci nira i nga'ayay a sapiradom to nanom ^epah ato patelian to maamaan. O sowal no mikingkiway o mafanaay a pasowal a tamdaw i, naitiniay i Aciw amilingato, dodosato to rikol no 4,000 amihecaan malengak to a tayra i Aforika , dodosato a tayra i cowaco:wa a kanataran, aninisato ano i Mosiko to, ano i Miro ato Tayko to iraay to amahpinang kopi paloma to tana'al/toto' to pinapi:na a mihecaan. Itini i Icipoto hawi, ora tana'al/toto' hananay o todongay o maro sapipatapi nira to mapatayay a tamdaw. Itinisato i Henan no Ciowkuk to 'ayaw no pito ano falo so'ot a mihcaan i, ora tana'al/toto' hananay iraay to ma'alaw amasadak naitadem. Tangasa imatini pakaaraay to 'enem ato pito so'ot a mihecaan tora Hemo ponka no Koaping . O pinangan no tana'al/toto'葫瓜/葫蘆瓜的特徵 Matiya o masay ami dapdap ko rengaw nira, kakahaday salimolosanay cifanohay hatatosatosa saan ko papah nira, iraay mato fokes ngisngis sapi kalic nira i kilang, malawod ko kacihelangan ato kalafawfawan i ano fa'inayang to ano fafahian to mahecaday to aci hana to tomel'iay hana. Ka'edaw no pirarad nira i pakaaraay to 15 komi, saciheci sa irako rimoroay matomari, irako tosaay koka rimoro, irako ko'edaway pakaaraay to cecay komi, oraloma' ora heci nira i, sato saan o kangdaway ato tomeli'ay, nikaorila metalaw toka si^enawan ato kafaliyosan. Sama^nen komaen ko heci nira.如何食用葫瓜/葫蘆瓜 Ano ciheci to kola tana'al/toto' i, yacaho ka 'ikes i, ri'ayawen to ami ridateng ami ara, tada fangcalay ama radateng, ano sakohawen to ano chiyanen to, nga'ayay to ami samaamaan ami tangtang. Nikaorila itini i Dipong i, oroma pecihanho ami cikcik ami pawari, rikol sato ami tangtang maro dadeng, itini no Amilikaan i, irako mipacamolay to sapafangsi ami tangtang tiya o maro nananomen nangra, romasato oya 'akaway nira ato papah nira iraay komi sadadengay a komaen. Oya ma'ikesay a heci nira.純熟的葫瓜果/葫蘆瓜果 Ma'ikes to ko heci no tana'al/toto' i, caay to kaga'ay a kaladatengen ami tangtang, sanaw araen ami ritod ami pawali mi'icang, ano ma^engto koka 'ateka nira i, ritosa han ami pela', falahen koya laloma'ay nira, tiya maro papa sapicahok to nanom to felac to poliyaw to kalo- maamaan, romasa ano caay ka pela'en i, kolkol hanca nani fafaled koya iraloma'ay nira, tiya malo sapi radom to nanom, o patelian to 'epah ato kalomaamaan, irako micongaay i papotal nira tosaka kapah a paca'it i patih ato fadahon no roma'. Sanaw i itini toya mipaypayiay a tamdaw i, maolahay ami ara to heci no tana'al/toto' tosapi sakawas nangra. Romasato ngaay sasa'angen to sapiparadiw kora ma'ikesay a heci nira. Samaanen ami paroma to tana'al/toto'.如何種植葫瓜/葫蘆瓜 Sapaloma to tana'al/toto' i, pakayraay toya kakoc nira, sa'ayaw miara to kakoc nira ami pawali ami 'icang, tiya ami misasapal, ma^engko to'as nira i, palomaen i omah, o lengaw no tana'al/toto' i matiyato masay ami dapdap ami kalic i kilang, sanaw misanga misarangra topi palomaan to tana'al/toto', opipalomaan to tana'al/toto' i, ma^deng itira i saka 3~4 a folad to cecay amihecaan, tangasasato i 9 a folad, ma^deng to aci falo aci hana ci heci. Itini i so^metay a romia'ad a marengaw, maolah a pananomen, ano matatodong kopi pananom, facal koka rengaw nira. Romasato ano matatodong kopipacidal ato fangcal ko ka rengawan nira a sota'para i, kalamkamay aci falo aci hana, tiya adihay fangcal ko heci nira. Ano misanga topi salangraan i, matiyahan opisanga' to palomaan to foto , polong no omaomahan ami salangra, tiya matating kora heci nira, tala'ayaw koka tata'ak no heci nira i, ira komi tafoay to heci nira to sakacaaw kacifao, tiya fangcal makapah koheci nira, ano matatodong koka tata'ak no heci nira i, ma^eng to a araen, tiya mangaay to a kaladatengen, nawhani o heci no tana'al/toto' i, nanomamang tangasa katata'akan nira i, sahto o kangdaway, ano caay ka tatodong ami siwka i, aratek matafesiw to ko pisiwkakan, caay to kanga'ay a mara dadeng. Opisiwkakan to tana'al/toto'葫瓜/葫蘆瓜收成期 Opisiwkakan to tana'al/toto' i ma^edeng itira saka 9 folad, sanaw malawod ko 8 a folad i misatapang to ami compi to sakataial, tayni i omah ami hapinang toka ciheci nira, ano kangdawho i ko^engelayho cingra madengay a datengen, ano adihay sato i manga'ay a cikciken ami pawali to sapipa halafin a nga'ay a kaladatengen, ano ma'ikes to koya heci no tana'al/toto' i, satemeli' sato ko podac nira, 'atekakay to caay to kangaay a kaladatengen, 'ican hato i tapangan tagasa ika'ikesan nira i, sa'ateka sato koya podac nira tiya mirito, miliyaw ami pawali, to sasangaen to papa/toto' , lomasato to sapiladom o patelian to nanom, aca o sasangaen to sasalamaan. Ano militod to tana'al/toto' i, mi'osawan ko 'akaway/wikol nira ami saka ^edaw, tiya manga'ay ami tatoy, ano mi tangtang to tana'al/toto' i, iraay ko mipodacay iraay ko caay pipodac, nikaorira cifanohay ko podac nira, sanaw solingaen kopi sasaw tiya mitangtang.(Siwkolan 'Amis suman0627/'23
S.PHON: === tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ === o~u ɾikisi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ**/****** itini i ʡo~urip no~u kaɾo~utamtamɬ~ɮaw, o~uɾanan a tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ ħananaj a ɬ~ɮatəŋ i, iɾaaj to~u a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw aʦa no~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis, ɾo~umasato~u o~uja maʡikəsaj miʡiʦaŋan a ħəʦi nira i ŋaʡajaj a sapiraɬ~ɮo~um to~u nano~um ʔəpaħ ato~u patəɾian to~u maamaan. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u mikiŋkiwaj o~u mafanaaj a paso~uwaɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw i, naitiniaj i aʦiw amiɾiŋato~u, ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~usato~u to~u riko~uɾ no~u *,*** amiħəʦaan maɾəŋak to~u a tajra i afo~urika , ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~usato~u a tajra i ʦo~uwaʦo~u:wa a kanataran, aninisato~u ano~u i mo~usiko~u to~u, ano~u i miro~u ato~u tajko~u to~u iraaj to~u amaħpinaŋ ko~upi paɾo~uma to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ to~u pinapi:na a miħəʦaan. itini i iʦipo~uto~u ħawi, o~ura tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ ħananaj o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj o~u maro~u sapipatapi nira to~u mapatajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. itinisato~u i ħənan no~u ʦio~uwko~u~uk to~u ʡajaw no~u pito~u ano~u faɾo~u so~uʡo~ut a miħʦaan i, o~ura tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ ħananaj iraaj to~u maʡaɾaw amasaɬ~ɮak naitaɬ~ɮəm. taŋasa imatini pakaaraaj to~u ʡənəm ato~u pito~u so~uʡo~ut a miħəʦaan to~ura ħəmo~u po~unka no~u ko~uapiŋ . o~u pinaŋan no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ**/****** matija o~u masaj ami ɬ~ɮapɬ~ɮap ko~u rəŋaw nira, kakaħaɬ~ɮaj saɾimo~uɾo~usanaj ʦifano~uħaj ħatato~usato~usa saan ko~u papaħ nira, iraaj mato~u fo~ukəs ŋisŋis sapi kaɾiʦ nira i kiɾaŋ, maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kaʦiħəɾaŋan ato~u kaɾafawfawan i ano~u faʡinajaŋ to~u ano~u fafaħian to~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u aʦi ħana to~u to~uməɾʡiaj ħana. kaʡəɬ~ɮaw no~u piraraɬ~ɮ nira i pakaaraaj to~u ** ko~umi, saʦiħəʦi sa irako~u rimo~uro~uaj mato~umari, irako~u to~usaaj ko~uka rimo~uro~u, irako~u ko~uʡəɬ~ɮawaj pakaaraaj to~u ʦəʦaj ko~umi, o~uraɾo~umaʡ o~ura ħəʦi nira i, sato~u saan o~u kaŋɬ~ɮawaj ato~u to~uməɾiʡaj, nikao~uriɾa mətaɾaw to~uka siʔənawan ato~u kafaɾijo~usan. samaʔnən ko~umaən ko~u ħəʦi nira.******/*** ano~u ʦiħəʦi to~u ko~uɾa tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, jaʦaħo~u ka ʡikəs i, riʡajawən to~u ami riɬ~ɮatəŋ ami ara, taɬ~ɮa faŋʦaɾaj ama raɬ~ɮatəŋ, ano~u sako~uħawən to~u ano~u ʦħijanən to~u, ŋaʡajaj to~u ami samaamaan ami taŋtaŋ. nikao~uriɾa itini i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, o~uro~uma pəʦiħanħo~u ami ʦikʦik ami pawari, riko~uɾ sato~u ami taŋtaŋ maro~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋ, itini no~u amiɾikaan i, irako~u mipaʦamo~uɾaj to~u sapafaŋsi ami taŋtaŋ tija o~u maro~u nanano~umən naŋra, ro~umasato~u o~uja ʡakawaj nira ato~u papaħ nira iraaj ko~umi saɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋaj a ko~umaən. o~uja maʡikəsaj a ħəʦi nira.******/**** maʡikəs to~u ko~u ħəʦi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, ʦaaj to~u ka*aʡaj a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən ami taŋtaŋ, sanaw araən ami rito~uɬ~ɮ ami pawaɾi miʡiʦaŋ, ano~u maʔəŋto~u ko~uka ʡatəka nira i, rito~usa ħan ami pəɾaʡ, faɾaħən ko~uja ɾaɾo~umaʡaj nira, tija maro~u papa sapiʦaħo~uk to~u nano~um to~u fəɾaʦ to~u po~uɾijaw to~u kaɾo~u- maamaan, ro~umasa ano~u ʦaaj ka pəɾaʡən i, ko~uɾko~uɾ ħanʦa nani fafaɾəɬ~ɮ ko~uja iraɾo~umaʡaj nira, tija maɾo~u sapi raɬ~ɮo~um to~u nano~um, o~u patəɾian to~u ʡəpaħ ato~u kaɾo~umaamaan, irako~u miʦo~uŋaaj i papo~utaɾ nira to~usaka kapaħ a paʦaʡit i patiħ ato~u faɬ~ɮaħo~un no~u ro~umaʡ. sanaw i itini to~uja mipajpajiaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, mao~uɾaħaj ami ara to~u ħəʦi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ to~usapi sakawas naŋra. ro~umasato~u ŋaaj sasaʡaŋən to~u sapiparaɬ~ɮiw ko~ura maʡikəsaj a ħəʦi nira. samaanən ami paro~uma to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ.******/*** sapaɾo~uma to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, pakajraaj to~uja kako~uʦ nira, saʡajaw miara to~u kako~uʦ nira ami pawaɾi ami ʡiʦaŋ, tija ami misasapaɾ, maʔəŋko~u to~uʡas nira i, paɾo~umaən i o~umaħ, o~u ɾəŋaw no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i matijato~u masaj ami ɬ~ɮapɬ~ɮap ami kaɾiʦ i kiɾaŋ, sanaw misaŋa misaraŋra to~upi paɾo~umaan to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ, o~upipaɾo~umaan to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, maʔɬ~ɮəŋ itira i saka *~* a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦəʦaj amiħəʦaan, taŋasasato~u i * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maʔɬ~ɮəŋ to~u aʦi faɾo~u aʦi ħana ʦi ħəʦi. itini i so~uʔmətaj a ro~umiaʡaɬ~ɮ a marəŋaw, mao~uɾaħ a panano~umən, ano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~upi panano~um, faʦaɾ ko~uka rəŋaw nira. ro~umasato~u ano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~upipaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ato~u faŋʦaɾ ko~u ka rəŋawan nira a so~utaʡpara i, kaɾamkamaj aʦi faɾo~u aʦi ħana, tija aɬ~ɮiħaj faŋʦaɾ ko~u ħəʦi nira. ano~u misaŋa to~upi saɾaŋraan i, matijaħan o~upisaŋaʡ to~u paɾo~umaan to~u fo~uto~u , po~uɾo~uŋ no~u o~umao~umaħan ami saɾaŋra, tija matatiŋ ko~ura ħəʦi nira, taɾaʡajaw ko~uka tataʡak no~u ħəʦi nira i, ira ko~umi tafo~uaj to~u ħəʦi nira to~u sakaʦaaw kaʦifao~u, tija faŋʦaɾ makapaħ ko~uħəʦi nira, ano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~uka tataʡak no~u ħəʦi nira i, maʔəŋ to~u a araən, tija maŋaaj to~u a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən, nawħani o~u ħəʦi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, nano~umamaŋ taŋasa katataʡakan nira i, saħto~u o~u kaŋɬ~ɮawaj, ano~u ʦaaj ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ami siwka i, aratək matafəsiw to~u ko~u pisiwkakan, ʦaaj to~u kaŋaʡaj a mara ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəŋ. o~upisiwkakan to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ**/****** o~upisiwkakan to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i maʔəɬ~ɮəŋ itira saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, sanaw maɾawo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i misatapaŋ to~u ami ʦo~umpi to~u sakataiaɾ, tajni i o~umaħ ami ħapinaŋ to~uka ʦiħəʦi nira, ano~u kaŋɬ~ɮawħo~u i ko~uʔəŋəɾajħo~u ʦiŋra maɬ~ɮəŋaj a ɬ~ɮatəŋən, ano~u aɬ~ɮiħaj sato~u i maŋaʡaj a ʦikʦikən ami pawaɾi to~u sapipa ħaɾafin a ŋaʡaj a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən, ano~u maʡikəs to~u ko~uja ħəʦi no~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, satəməɾiʡ sato~u ko~u po~uɬ~ɮaʦ nira, ʡatəkakaj to~u ʦaaj to~u kaŋaaj a kaɾaɬ~ɮatəŋən, ʡiʦan ħato~u i tapaŋan ta*asa ikaʡikəsan nira i, saʡatəka sato~u ko~uja po~uɬ~ɮaʦ nira tija mirito~u, miɾijaw ami pawaɾi, to~u sasaŋaən to~u papa/to~uto~uʡ , ɾo~umasato~u to~u sapiɾaɬ~ɮo~um o~u patəɾian to~u nano~um, aʦa o~u sasaŋaən to~u sasaɾamaan. ano~u miɾito~uɬ~ɮ to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, miʡo~usawan ko~u ʡakawaj/wiko~uɾ nira ami saka ʔəɬ~ɮaw, tija maŋaʡaj ami tato~uj, ano~u mi taŋtaŋ to~u tanaʡaɾ/to~uto~uʡ i, iraaj ko~u mipo~uɬ~ɮaʦaj iraaj ko~u ʦaaj pipo~uɬ~ɮaʦ, nikao~urira ʦifano~uħaj ko~u po~uɬ~ɮaʦ nira, sanaw so~uɾiŋaən ko~upi sasaw tija mitaŋtaŋ.(siwko~uɾan ʡamis so~u~uman****/ʡ**
